transcript: So what do you think, is it just some psycho, or are we dealing with something more serious here? Have you checked all the CCTV cameras yet? We have, but somehow all the drives are wiped. I don't need to tell you that, but five bodies in two weeks, all killed the same way. We've got a serial psychotic killer on the loose, young man. Hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, hello, Thanks for watching! I'm sorry. how do you like it, detective? Took me a long time to perfect. Well, I'm talking about the prison machine, of course. It's the product of my latest creation. A virtual reality prison, so to speak. Whoa, that is so exciting! You see, detective, the wicked no longer fears death. And with this device, I can send any man to the foot of insanity. Get me the hell out of here! Be careful what you wish for, detective. This just might be your best reality yet Oh, my God.
